parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({request_id: $json.request_id, requester_name: $json.requester_name, requester_email: $json.requester_email, requester_organization: $json.requester_organization, event_name: $json.event_name, event_description: $json.event_description, requested_date: $json.requested_date, requested_start_time: $json.requested_start_time, requested_end_time: $json.requested_end_time, room_requested: $json.room_requested, estimated_attendees: $json.estimated_attendees, setup_requirements_raw: $json.setup_requirements_raw, calendar_available: $json.calendar_available}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({request_id: $json.request_id, email_type: 'admin_review_notification', recipient: $env.ADMIN_EMAIL, subject_prefix: '[CGCS Intake]', context: {decision: $json.decision, event_name: $json._form.event_name, requester_name: $json._form.requester_name, requester_email: $json._form.requester_email, requester_organization: $json._form.requester_organization, requested_date: $json._form.requested_date, requested_start_time: $json._form.requested_start_time, requested_end_time: $json._form.requested_end_time, room_requested: $json._form.room_requested, estimated_attendees: $json._form.estimated_attendees, is_eligible: $json.is_eligible, eligibility_reason: $json.eligibility_reason, pricing_tier: $json.pricing_tier, estimated_cost: $json.estimated_cost, room_assignment: $json.room_assignment, draft_response: $json.draft_response, calendar_available: $json.calendar_available, conflicting_events_count: $json.conflicting_events_count}}) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({status: 'received', request_id: $('Merge Agent + Form Data').first().json.request_id, message: 'Thank you for your event space request. It has been received and is being reviewed by the CGCS team. You will receive a response within one business day.'}) }}
